hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"documentary-junior-editor re-entry contract: START-HERE.md at the repo root is the canonical you-are-here doc. (1) If the user is returning or asks where things stand, read START-HERE.md plus the project memory and give the current state and the single next action. (2) Before wrapping up any session in which you made changes or decisions, UPDATE START-HERE.md so its Where-we-are section and the one Next-action line are current, and refresh the project memory. Jeff has ADHD and returns after long gaps, so this doc must never go stale."}}'
